behavior: The exact pinned Qwen3 Candle pair retrieves direct resume evidence and rejects high-risk requirement confusables without weakening the deterministic default, credential boundaries, or military-to-civilian non-equivalence rules.
revision_scope: The committed six-pair synthetic requirement hard-negative fixture, its always-on contract tests, the original three-pair production-path model baseline, and the three-pair direct-component model expansion.

expanded_cases.query: Current unrestricted registered nurse (RN) license required
expanded_cases.positive: Explicit current, active, unrestricted civilian RN license.
expanded_cases.hard_negative: Army combat medic emergency-care experience without civilian RN-license evidence.
expanded_cases.boundary: Military medical experience can be relevant but is not treated as civilian licensure.

expanded_cases.query: Experience managing at least ten software engineers
expanded_cases.positive: Twelve direct reports with performance-review and hiring ownership.
expanded_cases.hard_negative: Mentoring two developers and leading design reviews.
expanded_cases.boundary: Mentoring and technical leadership are not treated as people-management scope.

expanded_cases.query: Experience owning a GAAP month-end close
expanded_cases.positive: GAAP close, journal-entry, and general-ledger ownership.
expanded_cases.hard_negative: Invoice and purchase-order processing in accounts payable.
expanded_cases.boundary: Shared accounting context is not treated as month-end close ownership.

expanded_observations.case: civilian RN license versus Army combat medic
expanded_observations.decision: The positive passes retrieval and reranker acceptance. The military-medical near miss is rejected at retrieval and remains far below reranker acceptance when directly compared.
Both candidates reach retrieval. The reranker accepts direct management ownership and rejects mentoring-only evidence.

expanded_observations.case: GAAP close owner versus accounts-payable processor
expanded_observations.decision: Both candidates reach retrieval. The reranker accepts close ownership and rejects adjacent accounting work.

tdd_evidence.red: The always-on fixture contract expected six requirement hard negatives and observed three.
tdd_evidence.green: The checked-in fixture contains six exact requirement hard negatives and freezes the military-medic text and civilian-license distinction.

tdd_evidence.red: The first RN wording produced a positive reranker score of 1.6543779, below the unchanged 3.0 acceptance threshold.
tdd_evidence.green: A literal current, active, unrestricted RN-license record produced 5.5918465 without changing the threshold; the military-medic near miss produced -9.155273.

tdd_evidence.red: Membership filtering returned JSON order instead of the caller's requested query order.
tdd_evidence.green: The selector follows explicit query order and fails if a selected query is missing or duplicated.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS JOBSENTINEL_QWEN3_TEST_CACHE=/tmp/jobsentinel-qwen3-calibration-20260719 cargo test -p jobsentinel-local-ai --features embedded-ml matcher::qwen3::tests::pinned_qwen3 -- --ignored --test-threads=2
commands.relevant_result: Both exact committed-revision model tests passed in 503.22 seconds. The original three pairs passed production matching with fresh and cached vectors plus hard-negative-only abstention. The three expanded pairs passed pinned dense and reranker score, order, retrieval, and acceptance assertions.
commands.caveat: The model tests are ignored by default and require an explicit checksum-verified cache. The expanded cases exercise direct embedding and reranker components, not the full production pair and hard-negative-only path.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo test -p jobsentinel-local-ai --features embedded-ml
commands.relevant_result: All 77 default embedded local-AI tests passed with 11 explicit model tests ignored.
commands.caveat: The explicit two-test model command above supplies the model-backed result.

commands.command: env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo clippy -p jobsentinel-local-ai --features embedded-ml --lib -- -D warnings; env -u JOBSENTINEL_LIVE_KEYRING_TESTS cargo fmt --all -- --check
commands.relevant_result: Strict production-library Clippy and Rust formatting passed.
commands.caveat: The broad workspace verify:rust lane was not rerun because this slice changes one local-AI fixture and its tests.

commands.command: npm run harness:plan -- --since edf0f1bd; npm run lint:file-size; npm run harness:check; npm run lint:architecture; npm run lint:security; jq empty crates/jobsentinel-local-ai/src/eval_fixtures/seed_v1.json; git diff --check
commands.relevant_result: Harness routing, hard file limits, harness state, architecture, security sensors, secret scanning, JSON parsing, and diff validation passed.
commands.caveat: The two cohesive Rust test owners crossed only the soft modularization review threshold and were not split into additional files.

commands.relevant_result: The reviewer first blocked false test naming, positional fixture selection, an unfrozen veteran boundary, and indirect score-margin assertions. After correction, final re-review returned APPROVE.
commands.caveat: The reviewer inspected code and supplied check results but did not independently run model inference.

limitations: Six synthetic pairs are not production-wide calibration.
Only resume-requirement matching is covered; job-search and other query kinds remain unapproved.
The three expanded pairs measure direct embedding and reranker behavior. Only the original three pairs exercise the full production path.
The result is from one macOS 27 arm64 64 GiB development host. It does not prove Windows 11, macOS 26, Linux, or modest-hardware stability.
The measured model-backed test is not model-free Essentials footprint evidence.
Weak, medium, and strong user-facing bands, the job-search thresholds, and the MiniLM threshold remain unapproved.
Installed model setup, consent, progress, cancel, retry, removal, fallback, and cache cleanup remain open.

gate_4_status.next_evidence: Measure the model-free Essentials package, startup, memory, and core journey under an 8 GiB budget.
blocked_release_claims: Model-free 8 GiB footprint and journey measurements.
Windows 11, macOS 26 and later, and Linux package and runtime matrix.

privacy_and_network.static_path_review: The model-test constructors load only the explicit checksum-verified cache and contain no download, external AI, credential, or Keychain call.
